1508: Capitana Morgana raided the port of Nassau
1513: El Cuervo Negro was shipwrecked near Skull Rock
1519: Barbanegra founded a hideout on Tortuga
1524: The treasure of Isla del Fuego was buried by Captain Reyes
1531: A mutiny broke out aboard the Serpiente Dorada near Coral Bay
1537: Barbablanca defeated the Royal Fleet at Devil's Strait
1542: El Pata de Palo established a trading post in Puerto Cangrejo
1549: The ghost ship Ánimas was last seen near Fog Island
1556: Capitana Morgana signed a truce at Turtle Island
1563: Barbanegra's crew discovered the Cave of Whispers on Isla Sombra
1571: A great storm sank three galleons off Shark Reef
1578: El Cuervo Negro captured the merchant ship Esperanza near Bahía Perdida
1585: Barbablanca retired to a cottage on Turtle Island
1593: The legendary map of Isla del Fuego was stolen from Puerto Cangrejo
1601: Capitana Morgana's fleet was ambushed at Devil's Strait
